archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast - Tailored for Linear/Notion-like Enterprise App)

global_design_rules.philosophy: Sophisticated, modern minimalism. High contrast, neutral timeless aesthetic. No generic SaaS blue—use deep graphite for CTAs, structural grayscale for hierarchy, and very subtle, highly purposeful accent colors.
global_design_rules.spacing_system: Tight and structured for dashboard density (gap-4, gap-6), but generous padding inside containers (p-4 to p-6) to maintain clarity. Everything aligns strictly to a grid.
global_design_rules.borders_and_shadows: Rely on 1px solid borders (border-zinc-200) rather than shadows for structure. Use very subtle ambient shadows (shadow-sm) only for interactive or elevated components (cards, dropdowns, modals).
global_design_rules.corner_radius: Crisp and technical. Use rounded-md (6px) for cards/buttons, rounded-sm for small tags. No large pill shapes.
global_design_rules.accessibility: High contrast text. Focus rings must be visible (focus:ring-1 focus:ring-zinc-900).

headings.style_rules: tracking-tight, leading-none, font-semibold to font-black. High contrast (text-zinc-900).

body.style_rules: leading-relaxed, highly legible, text-zinc-600 for secondary, text-zinc-900 for primary.

dashboard_shell.sidebar: w-64 (open) or w-16 (closed) fixed left. bg-zinc-50 border-r border-zinc-200. Clean hover states on navigation links with Lucide icons.
dashboard_shell.topbar: h-16 fixed top, left-64 (adjusts with sidebar). bg-white border-b border-zinc-200. Contains Global Search (cmd+k style), notifications, quick create button, user profile.
dashboard_shell.main_content: pt-16 pl-64 (or pl-16 when closed) bg-white min-h-screen.
dashboard_shell.mobile: Bottom navigation bar (h-16) for core modules, hiding sidebar on small screens.

dashboard_grid.classes: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 p-6
dashboard_grid.widget_rules: Summary metrics are col-span-1. Main charts/pipeline span 2 or 3 columns. Items stretch to match height.

kanban_pipeline.column: w-80 flex-shrink-0 bg-zinc-50 rounded-lg p-3 border border-zinc-200 flex flex-col gap-3
kanban_pipeline.card: bg-white p-4 rounded-md border border-zinc-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md hover:border-zinc-300 transition-all cursor-grab active:cursor-grabbing

shadcn.button: rounded-md font-medium transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-zinc-950 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50. Primary: bg-zinc-900 text-zinc-50 hover:bg-zinc-900/90. Secondary: bg-white border border-zinc-200 hover:bg-zinc-100 text-zinc-900.
shadcn.card: rounded-md border border-zinc-200 bg-white text-zinc-950 shadow-sm.
shadcn.input: flex h-9 w-full rounded-md border border-zinc-200 bg-transparent px-3 py-1 text-sm shadow-sm transition-colors file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-zinc-500 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-zinc-950 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50.
shadcn.tabs: List: h-9 items-center justify-center rounded-none border-b border-zinc-200 bg-transparent p-0. Trigger: inline-flex items-center justify-center whitespace-nowrap px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium ring-offset-white transition-all focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-zinc-950 focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 data-[state=active]:border-b-2 data-[state=active]:border-zinc-900 data-[state=active]:text-zinc-950 data-[state=active]:shadow-none.

icons.instructions: Use Lucide icons for all UI elements. For the company/brand logo, use an icon like <Box /> or <Hexagon /> combined with the brand name in Satoshi.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Subtle background color shifts (e.g., bg-transparent to bg-zinc-100) with 150ms ease-in-out.
motion_and_interactions.active: Scale down very slightly (scale-95) for buttons. Kanban cards lift slightly (-translate-y-1, shadow-md).
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: None to minimal. Focus on instant, snappy loading for enterprise efficiency.

auth_page_background.description: Modern architectural design with geometric lines. Use as a split-screen background for the Login/Signup page.

user_avatars.description: Professional headshot for the main logged-in user or key leads.
Professional headshot for team members or contacts.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the 'Clean enterprise' aesthetic (similar to Linear or Attio). Avoid unnecessary gradients, large colored boxes, or playful UI elements.
Ensure the sidebar is collapsible to 64px, revealing only icons when collapsed. When open, it should be 260px wide.
Use a 'Control Room Grid' for the dashboard. Gaps should be gap-4 or gap-6. Avoid massive paddings between widgets; keep it dense but readable.
For the Kanban board, implement a horizontally scrolling container with distinct vertical columns (bg-zinc-50). Cards should be clean white boxes.
All interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs) MUST have a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid='login-submit-button'`).

Do NOT use placeholder image URLs like via.placeholder.com. Use the provided avatar and background URLs. For missing company logos, use a Lucide React icon (like <Hexagon /> or <Triangle />) styled sharply.
Use standard Tailwind CSS classes. Use Shadcn components for complex interactions (Dropdowns, Tabs, Dialogs) but strip away heavily rounded corners to match the rounded-md (6px) rule.
Import Satoshi font via Fontshare CDN and Inter via Google Fonts in your index.html or global CSS. Apply Satoshi to headings and Inter to body text.
